name: Cryptogram: Cipher Word Master
description: A word puzzle game featuring a custom substitution cipher generation system. Built with dynamic text parsing, an adaptive hint system, and scalable data structures to efficiently manage and generate cryptogram puzzles from an extensive quote database.
highlights: Designed a substitution cipher generation algorithm ensuring valid solvable puzzle states.
Developed a parser to load and structure puzzle levels from local JSON datasets of popular quotes.
Implemented an adaptive hint system providing context-aware help during cipher solving.
